caption: A woman is captured in a close-up shot, appearing in a video call. She has dark hair and is wearing a striped button-down shirt and a black gaming-style headset with a microphone extending toward her mouth. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall with pale yellow curtains visible to her left. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the lower-left corner of her video feed. Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as she talks. In the initial moments, her gaze is slightly averted, but she gradually looks more directly forward. Her head remains relatively still, while her lips move and her expression varies slightly to reflect the cadence of her speech. The background and her attire remain consistent throughout the clip.
